FAA CONTRACT OBSERVER FOR MIDWAY AIRPORT SPOTTED A LANDSPOUT TORNADO THAT HAD FORMED ON THE LAKE BREEZE. THE TORNADO DISSIPATED AT 358 PM CDT. LOCATION IS APPROXIMATE BASED OFF PHOTOS TAKEN BY THE OBSERVER AND OTHER PHOTOS POSTED TO SOCIAL MEDIA...JUST SOUTHWEST OF THE INTERSECTION OF W 33RD STREET AND S PULASKI RD IN A LARGE INDUSTRIAL PARK. NO DAMAGE HAS BEEN REPORTED. THIS IS THE FIRST TORNADO WITHIN THE CITY LIMITS OF CHICAGO SINCE A BRIEF F-0 ON THE LOYOLA UNIVERSITY CAMPUS ON SEP. 22 2006.
